headline: Moderna (NASDAQ:MRNA) Beats Expectations in Strong Q1 CY2026, Stock Soars
summary: Biotechnology company Moderna (NASDAQ:MRNA) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 260% year on year to $389 million. Its GAAP loss of $3.40 per share was 12.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Moderna Stock Spikes After Earnings. Covid Vaccine Revenue Is a Growth Driver Again.
summary: Moderna  defied expectations of a Covid-revenue slowdown on Friday as the drugmaker delivered strong first-quarter results fueled by a surge in international vaccine sales.  One trend underscored growth in the quarter: higher Covid-19 vaccine sales, largely due to long-term government partnerships in international markets.  This marks a shift from previous quarters, when  Moderna  cautioned that its Covid vaccine revenue was slipping.

headline: Moderna’s Covid Vaccine Is Driving Growth Again. The Stock Is Down Anyway.
summary: Moderna  defied expectations of a Covid-revenue slowdown on Friday as a surge in international vaccine sales underpinned its first-quarter results.  Revenue more than tripled in  Moderna’s  latest quarter to $389 million from $108 million last year, handily beating analysts’ calls for $236.4 million.  Moderna logged a $1.34 billion net loss, or $3.40 a share.

content.title: Moderna’s Covid Vaccine Is Driving Growth Again. The Stock Is Down Anyway.

Revenue more than tripled in  Moderna’s  latest quarter to $389 million from $108 million last year, handily beating analysts’ calls for $236.4 million.  Moderna logged a $1.34 billion net loss, or $3.40 a share.
